text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: hselasky

New revision: 342724

Log:
  MFC r342456:
  Fix reading of USB sample rate descriptor for SPL Crimson Rev 1.

  Read first one entry, then try to read the full rate descriptor table.

  PR:			234380
  Sponsored by:		Mellanox Technologies

_U  stable/10/
